zh.lifeSummary: John Chapman是Thomas Chesman的兒子，於1613年出生在英國。他於大約1648年與Martha Wombrey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1655年6月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福享年42歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Chapman是Thomas Chesman的儿子，于1613年出生在英国。他于大约1648年与Martha Wombrey在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1655年6月13日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福享年42岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州費艾費爾德斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Chapman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a merchant or trader, Middle English chap(pe)man, chepman, Old English cēapmann, cēpemann, a compound of cēap ‘barter, bargain, price, property’ + mann ‘man’.
Jewish: adopted probably for a like-sounding or like-meaning name in some other European language; see for example   Kaufman  .

History: This name was brought independently to North America from England by numerous different bearers from the 17th century onward. John Chapmen (sic) was one of the free planters who assented to the ‘Fundamental Agreement’ of the New Haven Colony on June 4, 1639.

variants.name: Kaufman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Chaim, Emanuel, Moshe, Eytan, Herschel, Zvi, Ari, Aron.
Americanized form of German   Kaufmann  , and a variant of the same Jewish surname.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Kaufman meaning ‘merchant’. Compare Koyfman 2.

variants.name: Chipman
meanings: English: from Middle English chipman (Old English cȳp(e)mann), a side form of chapman, chepman ‘merchant, trader’; see Chapman , with which this name was interchangeable.

variants.name: Copeman
meanings: English (Norfolk and Suffolk): patronymic from the early Middle English personal name Cop(e)man, an Anglicized form of Old Scandinavian Kaupmaðr. It is a transferred use of Old Scandinavian kaupmaðr (Old Danish køpman) ‘merchant’, cognate with Old English cēapmann (see Chapman ), but there is no evidence for the occupational term in Middle English.
Americanized form of North German   Koopmann   or Dutch   Koopman  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.description: The Dutch discovered the Connecticut Region in 1614, but the European settlement of the region was largely the work of the English Puritans from Massachusetts.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: John Chapman was born in 1613, in England as the son of Thomas Chesman. He married Martha Wombrey about 1648, in Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 13 June 1655, in Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 42, and was buried in Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: John Chapman est né en 1613, à Angleterre, fils de Thomas Chesman. Il a épousé Martha Wombrey environ 1648, à Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 13 juin 1655, à Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

Lui sposato Martha Wombrey circa 1648, nel Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: John Chapmanは1613年にイギリスでThomas Chesmanの息子として生まれた。約1648年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドスタムフォードでMartha Wombreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1655年6月13日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドスタムフォードで42歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ファイルフィールドスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut, Britis: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드

ko.Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드
ko.lifeSummary: John Chapman(은)는 1613년 영국에서 Thomas Chesman의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1648년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드에서 Martha Wombrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1655년 6월 13일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 파어필드 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: John Chapman nasceu em 1613, em Inglaterra filho de Thomas Chesman. Ele casou-se com Martha Wombrey aproximadamente 1648, em Stamford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de junho de 1655, em Stamford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Stamford, Fairfield, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: John Chapman родился в 1613 г. в местности Англия. Его отца звали Thomas Chesman. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Wombrey около 1648 г. в местности стамфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 13 июня 1655 г. в местности стамфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности стамфорд, феирфиелд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: John Chapman nació en 1613, en Inglaterra como hijo de Thomas Chesman. Se casó con Martha Wombrey aproximadamente 1648, en Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de junio de 1655, en Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Stamford, Fairfield, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
